expectations.text: Invoice number (#2026-014) and amount ($4,500) are included
Due date (February 15) and days overdue (18) are mentioned
expectations.evidence: 'due on February 15, 2026. As of today, this invoice is 18 days past due'

expectations.text: Tone is firmer than a first reminder but still professional
expectations.evidence: References 'sent an initial reminder previously', uses 'I do need to resolve this', 'avoid any disruption' - firm but professional

expectations.text: Includes a clear call-to-action (pay by specific date or contact to discuss)
expectations.evidence: 'please remit payment by March 10, 2026, or contact me to discuss a payment arrangement'

expectations.text: References that this is the second reminder
expectations.evidence: 'I sent an initial reminder previously' and subject says 'Second Reminder'
